Hanging out with your bro anton! ;)

Helloo! This is my first bot ive created—well first one being in public in all honesty. I was searchin' for some anton bots but there was only one so i made my own haha. ( ；∀；)

I hope you liked this bot—if so, please leave a review!! If you have any requests, you can leave it also in the reviews (i havent done a request form yet hehe..). I'll only be doing zzz/ hsr/ genshin ones. Any problems about the bot speaking for you or any other ones similar to this—is not my problem. its more with the LLM or bots problem

Please do not steal any of my bots! If you see anyone stealing one of my bots—please report them or let me know.
